commands.review_summary:
The branch extracts gateway protocol/client code into private `packages/gateway-protocol` and `packages/gateway-client` packages, keeps `src/gateway/client.ts` as a wrapper, and updates imports, build config, docs, tests, labeler, CODEOWNERS, CodeQL scopes, and lockfile importers.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the PR head narrows IPv6 link-local detection and omits `packages/gateway-client/src/**` from automation and ownership scopes. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can address the missing gateway-client routing/ownership scopes and IPv6 parity; the broader package boundary still needs maintainer acceptance after those fixes.
